description: A dark graphic with a faint embossed seal in the background. At upper left is the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services logo and name. Below, a white label reads 'NEWS RELEASE' and a serif headline reads 'USCIS Launches Operation PARRIS, Targeting Fraudulent Refugee Applications in Minnesota'.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; NEWS RELEASE; USCIS Launches Operation PARRIS, Targeting Fraudulent Refugee Applications in Minnesota
